shortDescription.default: Adds a floating back-to-top button to SharePoint pages

longDescription.default: A lightweight SharePoint Framework web part that renders a floating action button. When users scroll down the page, the button appears and smoothly scrolls them back to the top on click. Supports SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, and Viva Connections.

features.title: Back to Top
features.description: Adds a floating back-to-top button that appears when scrolling down the page.
